name: KB Grounding Layer
owns: Retrieval, grounding, freshness checks, grounding provenance, truth arbitration, write governance
must_never: Let model priors silently replace Canonical or Authoritative Domain truth
Ground a governed claim from Analytical or Ephemeral source class
Discard freshness metadata during retrieval or compression
Mutate Canonical entities without explicit human approval flag
Release flagged output if arbitration audit write fails
notes: SQLite vector+graph store. HashEmbedder for v1 (MiniLM pluggable). Cosine similarity Python-side with numpy. max_hops configurable (default=3). Arbitration write-before-release enforced. Migration bridge with review gate.
